title: Mega64 just mentioned us Mega64s Eva 333 Podcast
display_title: Mega64 just mentioned us Mega64s Eva 333 Podcast
wikitext:
[]: Mega64 just mentioned us (Mega64's Eva 3.33 Podcast)             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Tue May 07, 2013 10:45 pm Right here. They namedropped Reichu and EvaMonkey. Love their mention to Love & Pop .

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Wed May 08, 2013 6:40 am So i guess that makes us....famous?

[]: Re: Mega64 just mentioned us             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 08, 2013 7:22 am C.A.P. wrote: Right here. They namedropped Reichu and EvaMonkey. Love their mention to Love & Pop .

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed May 08, 2013 8:24 am Hmm I'll have a watch of thiholymolyitsthreeandahalfhourslong.... Link posted was the live stream, heres the recording: http://www.twitch.tv/mega64podcast/c/2255612

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 08, 2013 9:15 am FOUND IT http://www.twitch.tv/mega64podcast/c/2255612?t=42m MEGA64, Y U NO ASK ME TO CALL IN? God, listening to this podcast is a painful reminder of how out touch I've been. I didn't know about a lot of this shit. Also, I see EGF member lastcody on there.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed May 08, 2013 9:47 am I was in the chat. They mentioned some of my comments. Did you see what Garret got from Rocco at the end?

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Wed May 08, 2013 10:26 am riffraff11235 wrote: I was in the chat. They mentioned some of my comments. Did you see what Garret got from Rocco at the end?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed May 08, 2013 10:34 am Catamari wrote: Where were you mentioned? I kinda wonder if I was, though I doubt it very highly.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed May 08, 2013 1:26 pm I'm not all that surprised that Evageeks crops up in Evangelion discussion here and there. After all, we are one of the biggest forums on the subject. That and we have people like Catamari, I.O., and all these other fun people to say interesting things

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 08, 2013 1:28 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: all these other fun people to say interesting things

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed May 08, 2013 1:31 pm About halfway through this now. All good stuff. A nice gathering-together of all the 3.0 stuff. Also: Distracting legs are distracting

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed May 08, 2013 3:15 pm ^ Just started but will need to rewatch 3.33 since the camrip only goes so far in terms of comprehension. And yeah, distracting. Going to age myself but I can so relate to Garrett (who's just a little younger than me) and Rocco, I remember that time in life as well when I discovered the series and watched EoE at the college anime club's screening.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed May 08, 2013 3:41 pm They called Reichu "Raichu" and a "he". It's funny cuz before I joined the forum I had this impression that Reichu was like the most famous Evangelion fan/commentator ever. People wrote: legs, distracting

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 08, 2013 3:50 pm Monk Ed wrote: They called Reichu "Raichu" and a "he".

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed May 08, 2013 4:01 pm Just finished watching. Awesome thing that he got as a present there, lucky buggers all of them

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed May 08, 2013 4:05 pm Jayfive wrote: Just finished watching.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed May 08, 2013 4:37 pm I think there might have been one or two things that I havent spotted in the rebuild forum but obviously going through what was or wasnt mentioned is spoiler-tastic :P

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed May 08, 2013 4:48 pm Oh yeah, Mega64. That's a good drink.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed May 08, 2013 5:23 pm Jayfive wrote: I think there might have been one or two things that I havent spotted in the rebuild forum but obviously going through what was or wasnt mentioned is spoiler-tastic :P

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed May 08, 2013 6:57 pm I am apparently made of fail, since anything I click on sends me to the live version of the podcast. None of the links provided get me the recording at all.
